%d person successfully added to selected.other: watu %d wameongezwa kwa mafanikio katika familia iliyochaguliwa.

Add people to your cart before assigning: Ongeza watu kwenye mkokoteni wako kabla ya kuwapangia familia.
Add people to your cart first, then come: Ongeza watu kwenye mkokoteni wako kwanza, kisha rudi kuwaongeza kwenye kikundi.
All people in your cart are already in a: Watu wote kwenye mkokoteni wako wako tayari katika familia. Hakuna anayeweza kupangiwa.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try: Hitilafu isiyotarajiwa imetokea. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
Assign cart members to a group: Panga wanachama wa mkokoteni kwenye kikundi
Assign people from your cart to a family: Panga watu kutoka kwenye mkokoteni wako kwenye familia
Character used as the decimal point in m: Herufi inayotumika kama nukta ya desimali katika kiasi cha fedha (mf. . au ,)
Character used to separate thousands in: Herufi inayotumika kutenganisha maelfu katika kiasi cha fedha (mf. , au .)
Configure how monetary amounts are displ: Sanidi jinsi kiasi cha fedha kinavyoonyeshwa katika mfumo wote.
Currency symbol to display next to monet: Alama ya sarafu ya kuonyesha karibu na kiasi cha fedha (mf. $, €, £, CHF, CAD $).
End date must be on or after the start d: Tarehe ya mwisho lazima iwe sawa au baada ya tarehe ya kuanza
Enter state/province for countries witho: Ingiza jimbo/mkoa kwa nchi ambazo hazina majimbo yaliyoamuliwa mapema
Everyone from linked groups checked in!: Kila mtu kutoka vikundi vilivyounganishwa ameingia!
Family name is required when creating a: Jina la familia linahitajika wakati wa kuunda familia mpya.
Tafadhali chagua jukumu la familia kwa %s.
Populates the fields below without savin: Inajaza sehemu zilizo chini bila kuhifadhi. Bonyeza Hifadhi kutumia.
Position of the currency symbol relative: Nafasi ya alama ya sarafu kulingana na kiasi.
Single character used as the decimal poi: Herufi moja inayotumika kama nukta ya desimali (mf. . au ,). Chaguo-msingi: .
Single character used to group thousands: Herufi moja inayotumika kupanga maelfu (mf. , au .). Chaguo-msingi: ,
Alama au msimbo unaoonyeshwa karibu na kiasi (mf. $, €, £, CHF, CAD $). Chaguo-msingi: $
The selected family no longer exists. Pl: Familia iliyochaguliwa haipo tena. Tafadhali onyesha upya ukurasa na ujaribu tena.
The selected group was not found. Please: Kikundi kilichochaguliwa hakikupatikana. Tafadhali chagua kikundi sahihi.
This is how dates, currency amounts, and: Hivi ndivyo tarehe, kiasi cha fedha, na nambari za simu zitakavyoonekana katika mfumo wote.
Thousands separator and decimal separato: Kitenga maelfu na kitenga desimali lazima viwe herufi tofauti.
Whether the symbol appears before or aft: Iwapo alama inaonekana kabla au baada ya kiasi cha nambari. Chaguo-msingi: Kabla ya kiasi
Your cart is empty. Add people to your c: Mkokoteni wako uko wazi. Ongeza watu kwenye mkokoteni wako kwanza.
goalAmount must be a non-negative number: goalAmount lazima iwe nambari isiyo hasi
